scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:wait"
scripts.dev:frontend:wait: npx wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/health -t 60000 && npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
